name: Prologue
title: Prologue by HTML5 UP
description: Fixed-sidebar personal portfolio with scrollable main content. Left sidebar (fixed, dark background) has three zones: top zone with circular avatar photo, name ('Jane Doe'), and title ('Hyperspace Engineer'); middle zone with icon-based navigation (Home/Intro, Portfolio, About Me, Contact); bottom zone with social icon links (Twitter, Facebook, GitHub, Dribbble, Email). Main content scrolls independently: Intro section has a fullscreen background image with centered heading and CTA button. Portfolio section (white bg) has heading, description, and a 3-column grid of 6 project thumbnails with titles. About Me section has heading, a large featured image, and bio paragraph. Contact section has heading, description, and a contact form (Name, Email, Message, Send). Footer with copyright. Teal/mint accent color (#8ebebc).

typography.style: Ultra-light weight throughout with large body size, creating an airy, spacious feel

layoutDetails: Fixed left sidebar with scrollable main content area. Sidebar uses flexbox with top/bottom zones. Main content sections are full-width within their container. Portfolio uses 3-column grid. Responsive hides sidebar on mobile, shows horizontal nav instead.
visualStyle: Clean, professional, sidebar-driven layout. Dark sidebar contrasts with light content area. Teal/mint accent adds warmth. Large body text and generous spacing create an open, readable feel.

name: Read Only
title: Read Only by HTML5 UP
description: Personal portfolio with fixed left sidebar layout. The sidebar contains a circular avatar image, name heading, tagline, vertical navigation menu (About, Things I Can Do, A Few Accomplishments, Contact), and social icon links (Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, GitHub, Email). Main content scrolls on the right side. Section One: full-width banner image followed by intro heading and paragraph. Section Two: 'Things I Can Do' with a 2x3 icon feature grid (code, cubes, book, coffee, bolt, users icons) listing skills. Section Three: 'A Few Accomplishments' with 3 horizontal article cards, each with a left-aligned image and right-aligned text. Section Four: contact form with Name, Email, Subject fields and Message textarea, plus Send Message and Reset buttons. Clean light theme with green accent color throughout.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with moderate weight contrast, monospace for code blocks (Source Code Pro)

layoutDetails: Fixed left sidebar (width ~25%) with scrollable main content area. Container-based layout. Sidebar stacks on top on mobile. Responsive grid system with col-6/col-12 breakpoints.
visualStyle: Clean, professional personal site with teal green accent. Fixed sidebar with avatar creates a resume/CV feel. Minimal decoration, content-focused.

name: Freelancer
title: Freelancer - Start Bootstrap Theme
description: Single-page freelancer portfolio with bold teal and dark navy color scheme. Fixed top navbar (dark navy #2c3e50 bg) with uppercase brand and 3 anchor links (Portfolio, About, Contact). Masthead section (teal #1abc9c bg) with centered SVG avatar illustration, uppercase heading, star-icon custom divider, and subtitle tagline. Portfolio section: centered uppercase heading with star divider, 6 portfolio items in a 3x2 grid (col-lg-4), each with hover overlay showing plus icon, clicking opens a Bootstrap modal with full image and description. About section (teal bg) with 2-column text layout and download button. Contact section with form (name, email, phone, message, send button). Three-column footer (dark navy) with location info, social icons (Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, Dribbble), and about text. Copyright bar below footer. Portfolio modals for each item.

typography.style: Bold uppercase geometric sans-serif headings with clean body text

layoutDetails: Fixed top navbar. Container-based layout with 6rem section padding. Portfolio grid uses col-lg-4 (3 columns). About section uses col-lg-4 x2 for text columns. Contact form in col-lg-8/col-xl-7. Footer is 3-column (col-lg-4). Responsive collapses at 992px.
visualStyle: Bold and colorful freelancer portfolio with teal and navy color blocking, uppercase typography, star-icon dividers, and portfolio modal popups. Confident and professional creative identity.

name: Resume
title: Resume - Start Bootstrap Theme
description: Single-page resume/CV theme with a fixed left sidebar navigation that transforms from a top navbar on mobile to a full-height side panel on desktop. Sidebar features a circular profile photo, name, and navigation links (About, Experience, Education, Skills, Interests, Awards). The main content area is divided into full-width sections separated by horizontal rules. About section shows full name in large uppercase Saira Extra Condensed font with orange-toned primary color accent, contact info, lead paragraph, and social media icon circles (LinkedIn, GitHub, Twitter, Facebook). Experience section lists 4 job positions with title, company, description, and date range in a flex row layout. Education section shows 2 entries with institution, degree, and GPA. Skills section displays programming language/tool icons (HTML5, CSS3, JS, Angular, React, Node, etc.) and a workflow checklist. Interests section has paragraph text. Awards section lists 7 certifications with trophy icons.

typography.style: Condensed uppercase headings with clean body text, strong typographic hierarchy with two distinct font families

layoutDetails: Fixed left sidebar (17rem width on lg+) with full-height primary-colored background. Main content uses container-fluid p-0. Each resume section has min-height 100vh with generous padding. Flexbox rows for experience/education entries with date on the right. Mobile: top navbar collapses sidebar.
visualStyle: Professional, clean, document-like. Burnt orange accent color on sidebar, links, and dates. White content area with horizontal rule dividers. Circular profile photo in sidebar. Strong typographic hierarchy with condensed uppercase headings.

name: Augustine
title: Augustine
description: Single-page personal portfolio with a fixed header containing site title, hamburger menu toggle, and horizontal navigation with smooth-scroll links (Intro, About, Works, Contact). Social icons row (Facebook, Twitter, GitHub, Dribbble) in header. Hero section with massive display heading and subtitle ('Digital Designer + Developer') with entrance animation. About section with pretitle label, large attention-getter paragraph. Resume section with two-column timeline layout: Experience (Spotify, Dropbox) and Education entries with bullet markers. Skills section with 8 horizontal progress bars (HTML 95%, Javascript 85%, React 70%, etc.). Selected Clients section with large text links. Works section with 2-column portfolio grid (6 items with thumbnail, category tag, title, lightbox gallery). Testimonials slider (Swiper) with avatar, name, company. Contact section with form and contact info. Footer with social links and back-to-top.

typography.style: Modern sans-serif body (Inter) paired with elegant serif headings (Castoro). Large display text for hero. Uppercase pretitle labels for section headers.

layoutDetails: Full-width sections with max-width container. Two-column timeline layout for resume. Portfolio uses 2-column grid with lightbox. Responsive grid system with stack-on-900 breakpoint. BEM naming convention.
visualStyle: Soft, muted teal color palette creating a calm, professional atmosphere. Light teal background throughout. Large typography for hero section. Timeline with bullet markers. Progress bars for skills. Clean, spacious layout.

name: Ceevee
title: Ceevee 2.0
description: Single-page personal resume/portfolio with a fixed navigation bar (Home, About, Resume, Works, Testimonials, Say Hello) and hamburger toggle. Hero section with parallax background image (rellax), large name heading, descriptive paragraph mentioning roles (graphic designer, illustrator, webdesigner), and row of 6 social icons. Scroll-down indicator with arrow. About section with profile photo (left column) and bio text with contact details and 'Download CV' button (right column). Resume section with 3 sub-sections: Career (2 entries), Education (2 entries), and Skills with 6 fat progress bars (HTML 85%, CSS 85%, Javascript 65%, Figma 90%, Illustrator 75%, Photoshop 60%). Portfolio section with 4-column image grid (8 items) linking to modal popups. Testimonials slider. Contact section with form and info. Footer with social links.

typography.style: Modern sans-serif body (Inter) with serif headings (IBM Plex Serif). All-caps section headers. Clean, professional typography.

layoutDetails: Full-width sections with centered container. About uses 2-column layout (3/9 split). Resume uses 2-column layout (3/9 split). Portfolio uses 4-column grid. Responsive with breakpoints at 400-1200px.
visualStyle: Dark hero with parallax scrolling creates dramatic first impression. Teal/cyan accent color for interactive elements. White content sections with clean typography. Fat progress bars for skills. Modal popups for portfolio items.

name: Epitome
title: Epitome
description: Dark-themed single-page personal portfolio for designers and developers. Starts with a preloader, then a sticky header with logo, smooth-scroll navigation (Intro, About, Services, Works, Say Hello), and social icons (Facebook, Twitter, Dribbble, Behance). Hero section has a large multi-line heading with name and title on a near-black background with a decorative grid overlay and profile image. About section on white background: lead paragraph, bio text, two CTA buttons (Hire Me outlined, Download CV filled), then a Work & Education timeline in two columns (3 work entries left, 3 education entries right) with vertical line and bullet markers. Services section on dark background with overlay: centered heading, 6 service cards in a 3-column grid (Brand Identity, Illustration, Web Design, Product Strategy, UI/UX Design, Mobile Design). CTA banner section. Works section: masonry portfolio grid with 6 project cards featuring hover overlays, titles, categories, and PhotoSwipe lightbox gallery. Testimonials slider with avatar, quote, and author citation. Contact section on dark background: large email link, description text, phone number, and social links. Footer with copyright and back-to-top button.

typography.style: Elegant serif pairing with classic editorial feel

layoutDetails: Max-width row container, flexbox grid with large-9/large-half columns, masonry portfolio layout, responsive with mobile menu toggle
visualStyle: Dark elegant portfolio with serif typography, pink-magenta accents, masonry gallery, and timeline resume layout

name: Ethos
title: Ethos
description: Dark-themed single-page personal portfolio with a modern editorial aesthetic. Preloader with dots-fade animation. Header features logo, slide-out navigation (Home, About, Services, Works, Say Hello), and a Download CV button. Hero section with full-screen parallax background image, large multi-line intro heading, text social links (Twitter, Behance, Dribbble), and scroll-down arrow. About section with numbered section intros (01): profile photo, bio text, then Career subsection with 4 work positions in a 2-column grid showing company, role, timeframe, and description. Services section on dark background with numbered intro (02): left column has heading and lead text, right column has an accordion-style services list (Product Design, Branding, Frontend Development, UX Research, Visual Design, E-Commerce) with expandable descriptions. Portfolio section with numbered intro (03): 6 project cards in a 2-column grid with image thumbnails, category labels, titles, and PhotoSwipe lightbox. Testimonials slider with 4 slides. CTA section. Footer on dark background: contact heading, email CTA button, contact blocks (Email, Phone, Social links), copyright, and back-to-top button.

typography.style: Modern sans-serif headings with serif body text, editorial numbered sections

layoutDetails: Max-width row container, flexbox grid with large-6/large-8 columns, vertical decorative lines, responsive with mobile menu toggle
visualStyle: Dark editorial portfolio with warm orange accents, numbered section intros, accordion services, and parallax hero

name: Hola
title: Hola
description: Dark-themed single-page personal portfolio with a classic design approach. Pace.js preloader bar. Sticky header with logo, smooth-scroll navigation (Home, About, Works, Blog, Contact), and mobile menu toggle. Hero section with full-screen parallax background, dark overlay, greeting heading ('Hello There'), large multi-line name and title, two outlined CTA buttons (Latest Projects, More About Me), scroll-down indicator, and vertical social icons sidebar (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, Behance, Pinterest). About section: centered intro with heading and lead text, then two-column layout — left column with bio text, right column with 6 animated skill bars (HTML5 90%, CSS3 85%, jQuery 70%, PHP 95%, WordPress 75%, Angular JS 90%). Two full-width CTA buttons (Download My CV, Hire Me Now). Work Experience timeline in two columns with vertical line and bullet markers. Works/Portfolio section: masonry grid with 8 portfolio items featuring hover overlays with title, category, and link icon, plus PhotoSwipe lightbox. Testimonials section. Blog section with post cards. CTA section. Stats counters. Contact section with form and info. Footer with social links and back-to-top.

typography.style: Classic serif-sans pairing with Libre Baskerville body and Montserrat headings

layoutDetails: 12-column grid system, col-six/col-twelve classes, masonry portfolio, responsive with tab-full stacking
visualStyle: Classic dark portfolio with dark red accents, comprehensive sections including blog, stats, skills, and timeline

name: Kards
title: Kards
description: Dark-themed single-page personal portfolio/resume with a card-based design approach. Pace.js preloader. Fixed top bar header with text logo 'KARDS', navigation links (Home, About, Resume, Portfolio, Services, Contact, Style Demo), and mobile menu toggle. Intro section with dark overlay on background: greeting 'Hello, World.', name heading, role badges (Front-end Developer, UI/UX Designer), and outlined More About Me button. Vertical social icons sidebar (Facebook, Behance, Twitter, Dribbble, Instagram). About section on white background: centered intro heading, profile photo with lead text, then two-column layout — left column with Profile info list (Fullname, Birth Date, Job, Website, Email), right column with 5 animated skill bars (HTML5 90%, CSS3 85%, jQuery 70%, PHP 95%, WordPress 75%). Two CTA buttons (Hire Me outlined, Download CV filled). Resume section on gray background: Work Experience timeline with 3 entries (vertical line, icon bullets, company/role/date/description), Education timeline with 3 entries. Portfolio section: 6 items in a 2-column masonry grid with hover overlays showing title and category, modal popups with full image and description. Services section. Stats counters. Contact section with form. Footer with social links, back-to-top, and copyright.

typography.style: Classic serif-sans pairing with Lora body and Poppins headings, card-based sections

layoutDetails: 12-column grid with col-six/col-twelve classes, block-1-2 portfolio grid, responsive with tab-full and block-mob-full stacking
visualStyle: Dark card-based portfolio with hot pink accents, comprehensive resume sections, skill bars, and modal portfolio popups

name: Lhander
title: Lhander
description: Dark-themed app landing page template designed to showcase a mobile application or SaaS product. Opens with a hero section featuring a greeting subtitle, large headline about the app, and CTA buttons (Learn More, Sign Up). Below is a 4-step process section (Sign Up, Upload, Create, Publish) explaining how the app works. The features section displays 6 feature cards in a 2-column grid with icon headers: Fully Responsive, Retina Ready, Stylish Design, Clean Code, Easy To Customize, Free of Charge. A pricing section shows 4 pricing plan cards (Starter, Standard, Business, Premium) with feature lists and Get Started buttons. The testimonials section uses a slider for user quotes. An FAQ section with expandable accordion items. A CTA section encourages newsletter signup with email input field. Footer with social links. Video popup modal available. Preloader on page load. Fixed navigation with smooth scrolling.

typography.style: Clean serif body text with bold sans-serif headings. Generous line-height (3rem/30px) for readability. Ionicons for feature icons.

layoutDetails: Single-page scrolling with fixed top navigation. Full-width sections with centered content. 2-column feature grid, 4-column pricing cards. FAQ accordion. Responsive stacking at 768px and below.
visualStyle: Dark, modern app landing page with teal accent on dark navy background. Clean section-based layout with alternating content blocks. Professional SaaS/startup aesthetic with pricing focus.

name: Luther
title: Luther
description: Modern dark-themed personal portfolio/resume template for designers and creatives. Opens with a hero section featuring a large introduction headline ('I am Luther, a digital designer'). The about section includes a personal bio, expertise list, and work experience timeline with company names and roles (e.g., Dropbox Product Designer, Frontend Developer). An education section lists degrees and institutions. The works section displays 6 recent projects in a Swiper slider with image thumbnails and titles (Retro Camera, The White Lamp, Rucksuck, Since Day One, Sand Dunes, Minimalismo), each opening in a modal overlay with project details and links. The contact section shows email, phone, and social links (Behance, Twitter, Dribbble, Instagram) with a Download CV button. Navigation is a slide-out mobile menu with smooth-scroll links (Intro, About, Works, Say Hello). Uses CSS custom properties with a warm palette and serif+sans-serif font pairing (DM Serif Display + Public Sans).

typography.fontFamily: Public Sans, sans-serif (body); DM Serif Display, serif (headings/display)
typography.style: Elegant serif display headings (DM Serif Display) with clean geometric sans-serif body (Public Sans). Professional typographic pairing for portfolio/resume context.

layoutDetails: Single-page scrolling with slide-out navigation menu. Full-width sections with centered content. Swiper slider for portfolio works. Timeline layout for experience and education. Modal overlays for project details.
visualStyle: Dark, sophisticated personal portfolio with warm gold accent on black background. Serif display headings create an elegant, professional feel. Clean timeline layout for resume sections. Minimal and refined.

name: Monica
title: Monica
description: Dark-themed personal brand / marketing consultant template with a professional, modern aesthetic. Opens with a hero section featuring a large headline about creating marketing strategies, with a CTA button. The about section includes a personal bio with a 'More About Me' link. The expertise section displays 4 service areas in a grid: Digital Marketing, Project Management, Content Marketing, and Research & Discovery, each with descriptions and a 'View All Services' link. A clients section showcases brand logos of past clients. A CTA section encourages consultation with a 'Let's Work Together' button. The journal/blog section shows 4 recent articles in a grid with thumbnail images, category tags, titles, and dates. The footer has three columns: about info, site links, and newsletter signup form with Mailchimp integration. Social links with SVG icons. Multi-page structure with separate about, services, blog, and contact pages. Swiper slider for testimonials. Uses CSS custom properties with amber/green palette and serif+sans-serif font pairing (DM Serif Display + Roboto Flex).

typography.fontFamily: Roboto Flex, sans-serif (body); DM Serif Display, serif (headings/display)
typography.style: Elegant serif display headings (DM Serif Display) with versatile sans-serif body (Roboto Flex). Professional typographic pairing suited for personal branding and consulting.

layoutDetails: Multi-page site with separate about, services, blog, single post, and contact pages. Full-width sections with centered content. Grid layout for expertise cards and blog articles. Swiper for testimonials.
visualStyle: Dark, warm, professional personal brand aesthetic with amber accent on charcoal background. Serif display headings create authority and elegance. Clean grid layouts for services and blog content.

name: Mini Profile
title: Mini Profile - Free Bootstrap CSS Template
description: Personal profile/portfolio single-page template with parallax scrolling effects. Hero section with parallax background image and centered heading. Welcome section with introductory text. Portfolio section with filterable project grid. Contact section with form (name, email, message). Multi-color accent scheme with green (#98cb00), orange (#cc6733), and blue (#3398cc). Clean minimal design with Open Sans font at 400/600 weights. Parallax window sections create depth between content areas.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with moderate weight contrast

layoutDetails: Bootstrap grid with parallax window sections. Portfolio grid with filterable items. Contact form in centered column.
visualStyle: Clean, minimal personal profile with parallax depth effects. Multi-color accent palette adds personality.

name: Multi Profile
title: Multi Profile, free responsive template
description: Multi-profile personal/team template with dark teal color scheme. Heading 'Multi Pro' with navigation buttons. Welcome section with introductory text. Image slider/carousel section with responsive carousel component. Team section with profile information. Blog section with article previews. Features section highlighting capabilities. 15 images throughout. Testimonial/client quotes included. Deep teal (#1b434c) to dark cyan (#08292b) gradient color palette. Open Sans font with italic variant.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif, white text on dark teal

layoutDetails: Bootstrap grid layout. Navigation buttons for section switching. Responsive carousel. Team profile cards. Blog article previews. Teal gradient backgrounds.
visualStyle: Rich dark teal color scheme with gradient transitions. Professional yet distinctive palette.

name: Outline
title: Outline, free responsive template
description: Personal portfolio template with a unique tab-based single-page layout where content panels switch via JavaScript rather than scrolling. Features a fullscreen blurred background image, a top header bar with phone number, centered brand name, and social icons. Navigation uses a horizontal icon+text menu bar below the header. Home panel shows a centered title with email subscription form. About Me panel displays a two-column layout with profile image, name, title, and biography. My Work panel presents a 3-column grid of project thumbnails with titles. Contact panel includes a full-width contact form and Google Maps embed.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with light body weight and bold headings

layoutDetails: Tab-based single-page layout with JavaScript panel switching instead of scrolling. Content panels are shown/hidden with fade transitions. Fixed background image with blur effect. Centered container with translucent content areas.
visualStyle: Dark translucent glassmorphism-like panels over blurred background. Minimal borders, clean typography. Card-style project blocks with image thumbnails. Elegant personal portfolio aesthetic.

name: Reflux
title: Reflux HTML CSS Template
description: Personal portfolio single-page template with a full-screen hero section and off-canvas hamburger menu. Four main sections: About Me with personal introduction text, Skills section displaying expertise with progress-style indicators, Portfolio/Work section with filterable image grid using Isotope layout and lightbox overlay for image viewing, and Contact Me section with a four-field form. The off-canvas menu slides in from the left with smooth animation. Dark red/maroon accent color used for buttons, links, and highlights. Clean white background with light gray alternating sections. Owl Carousel for content sliding. Google Fonts Lato typography throughout.

typography.style: Lato with wide weight range (100-900), clean and modern

layoutDetails: Full-width stacked sections. Off-canvas menu from left side. Hero section full-viewport. Portfolio uses Isotope masonry/filterable grid. Contact form centered in container.
visualStyle: Clean personal portfolio with maroon accent, white/light gray alternating sections, filterable portfolio grid with lightbox, and professional typography.

name: Stimulus
title: Stimulus HTML CSS Template
description: Personal portfolio and resume single-page template with parallax scrolling sections. Hero section splits into a left profile image area and right text content with welcome message, name, and CTA button. About section features a three-column layout: text description, background image, and a yellow-highlighted skills panel with progress bars (Frontend 90%, Backend 70%, HTML5/CSS3 80%). Services section shows 4 equal cards with Font Awesome icons in alternating yellow, dark, and white backgrounds. Experience section pairs a background image with job timeline. Education section mirrors the experience layout. Testimonial carousel and contact form with Google Map.

typography.style: Ultra-light weight throughout with uppercase small headings

layoutDetails: Single-page with parallax background sections. Bootstrap 3 grid with alternating colored sections. Skills panel uses progress bars. Experience/education use media list layout.
visualStyle: Modern personal portfolio with yellow/gold accent on dark and white alternating sections. Parallax background images. Light font weights. Professional resume feel.

name: Stream
title: Stream Responsive Template
description: Personal portfolio single-page template with a fullscreen Bootstrap carousel hero featuring 3 slides with fade transitions, centered text overlays, and CTA buttons. Custom slider controls with left/right arrows, dot indicators, and a scroll-down arrow. Sticky navigation bar appears below the carousel on scroll. About section with a three-column layout: profile image, bio text with social icons, and skills with animated progress bars. Gallery section displays an 8-image grid (4 columns) with hover overlay effects. Contact section with a form. Footer with social links.

typography.style: Standard sans-serif with bold headings and uppercase section subtitles

layoutDetails: Single-page with fullscreen carousel hero. Sticky nav on scroll. About uses 3-column layout. Gallery uses 4-column image grid. Bootstrap 3 grid.
visualStyle: Clean personal portfolio style. Green accent color. Fullscreen hero carousel with fade transitions. Image gallery with dark hover overlays. Minimal and focused.

name: Ultra Profile
title: Ultra Profile HTML5 Template
description: Personal portfolio and resume single-page template with a fullscreen hero section featuring a large name heading, Creative Director subtitle, description text, and a CTA button on a dark background image. Work section shows 3 service cards with Font Awesome icons, titles, and descriptions. Portfolio section uses an isotope filterable grid (All, HTML, Photoshop, Wordpress, Mobile) with 8 project thumbnails and hover overlays. Resume section splits into profile info (name, birthday, address, phone, email) and skills with progress bars. About section with a half-page background image and overlaid text. Contact section with a form. Fixed navbar with smooth scrolling.

typography.style: Elegant Raleway with bold headings and light body, uppercase navigation

layoutDetails: Single-page with fullscreen hero. Work in 3-column cards. Portfolio uses isotope filterable 4-column grid. Resume splits profile info and skills. About uses half-page bg image.
visualStyle: Professional personal portfolio. Red accent on dark and white sections. Isotope filterable gallery. Progress bars for skills. Half-page background images. Clean and polished.

name: Box
title: Box - Personal Portfolio Template
description: Minimal personal portfolio template with dark theme and yellow accent. Custom hamburger menu trigger with animated icon opening full-screen overlay navigation with links (Intro, About me, Services, Portfolio, Contact me) and social icons. Hero intro section with animated rotating text headlines ('design.', 'coding.', 'graphic.') and subtitle, plus mouse scroll indicator. Portfolio grid with 10 project thumbnails in masonry layout, hover overlay showing project title and category tags. Filterable portfolio with Shuffle.js. Minimal footer with copyright. Back-to-top button. Preloader with double-bounce spinner.

typography.style: Modern geometric sans-serif, minimal and clean

layoutDetails: Full-screen intro section, masonry portfolio grid with col-lg-3/col-sm-6, overlay navigation, responsive stacking at 991px
visualStyle: Minimal dark portfolio with golden yellow accents, animated text rotation, masonry grid, and full-screen overlay navigation

name: Ben Resume
title: Ben's Resume - Profile HTML Page
description: Personal resume/CV single-page template. Hero section with a large greeting heading and profile introduction. About section with a profile image, descriptive text, and skill highlights. Testimonials section with an Owl Carousel displaying four client reviews with profile photos. FAQ section using Bootstrap accordion with five collapsible items. Contact section with a simple form (name, email, message). Custom Plain font family. Yellow (#ffd500) primary accent color on dark backgrounds. Navbar with smooth scroll navigation to Introduction, About Me, Reviews, and Contact sections.

typography.style: Custom Plain font family with system font fallbacks. Clean and modern. Bold headings. Suitable for personal branding.

layoutDetails: Single-page vertical scroll with navbar smooth-scroll links. Hero is full-width with centered text. About uses image + text layout. Testimonials in Owl Carousel slider. FAQ uses Bootstrap 5 accordion. Contact form at bottom.
visualStyle: Bold personal branding with bright yellow (#ffd500) accent on dark backgrounds. Clean sections with generous whitespace. Carousel testimonials. Accordion FAQ. Modern resume aesthetic. Professional yet approachable.

name: Individual
title: Individual HTML Parallax Template
description: Personal parallax portfolio template built on Bootstrap 3 with a multi-section scrolling layout. Features three main content pages stacked vertically with parallax background transitions between them. The first section displays the site title 'Individual' with a large heading and introductory text over a parallax background image. The second section presents a two-column layout with left and right content areas. The third section includes a gallery grid with Magnific Popup lightbox for image viewing, plus a contact form. Each section transitions with a parallax scrolling effect between different background images.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with light body weight. Semi-bold headings. White text on parallax backgrounds, dark text on white content areas.

layoutDetails: Stacked full-width sections with parallax background images between content areas. Two-column content layout in middle section. Gallery grid with lightbox. Contact form at bottom.
visualStyle: Parallax-driven personal portfolio. Alternating between full-bleed background images and white content sections. Clean typography with blue accent. Lightbox gallery.

name: Marvel
title: Marvel HTML Bootstrap 4 Template
description: Personal portfolio single-page template built with Bootstrap 4. Opens with a full-screen hero section featuring an animated text rotator cycling through roles (Web Designer, UI Specialist) alongside an SVG illustration. Navigation includes a dark/light color mode toggle. Projects section uses an Owl Carousel slider showcasing work screenshots. Resume section displays a dual-column vertical timeline with year badges for experiences and education. Contact section includes an embedded Google Map, social links, and a multi-field contact form.

typography.style: Clean geometric sans-serif with bold headings and light body text

layoutDetails: Single-page scrolling with Bootstrap 4 grid. Full-screen hero with two-column layout. Fixed navbar with auto-hide on scroll via headroom.js.
visualStyle: Clean, modern portfolio with light background, SVG illustrations, animated text rotator, and timeline-based resume.
